data.title: Attacker exploits Hyperbridge, creates 1B bridged Polkadot tokens worth $237,000 on Ethereum, sparking security concerns.
data.description: An exploit on Hyperbridge allowed a hacker to create 1 billion bridged Polkadot tokens on the Ethereum network, resulting in a cash out of approximately $237,000. This incident has reignited discussions surrounding the security of bridges connecting different blockchains.

data.title: Analyst: Iran war impact on markets to last all 2026, affecting BTC recovery & delaying rate cuts until Q3 at least.
data.description: The repercussions of the conflict in Iran are expected to have a lasting impact on the markets throughout 2026, diminishing the possibility of any rate cuts until at least the third quarter, according to analysis from Nic Puckrin of the Coin Bureau. This extended influence is likely to disrupt market expectations and planning for the foreseeable future.

data.title: One Heung Kong Teams Up with Guangdong Fashion Week to Create a Global Fashion and Art Landmark
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, a media briefing for the upcoming 2026 37th Guangdong Fashion Week Spring Session took place on April 7 at the One Heung Kong Art Exhibition Hall. The event, titled "Saluting to Dreams," will commence on April 17 and continue through to April 24.

data.title: Bitcoin retains $70,000 as oil price jumps 8% on Iran tension, impacting global markets.
data.description: At the end of the week, Bitcoin maintained a value of $70,000 amid changing market conditions sparked by the disruption of negotiations between the US and Iran and the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: Michael Saylor, Strategy's head, hints at further Bitcoin buy; 105 transactions done since 2020 through debt and equity.
data.description: Since 2020, the company has finalized 105 Bitcoin transactions and is now taking a unique approach by consistently acquiring more BTC through corporate debt and equity funding.

data.title: Senator Cynthia Lummis warns US must pass the CLARITY Act before 2030 to secure financial future amid crypto regulation uncertainty.
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, a strong supporter of cryptocurrency, emphasized the importance of not delaying the CLARITY Act to secure the country's financial stability.

data.title: What 4 Million K-12 Submissions Reveal About the Hidden Work of Grading
data.description: Agilix Labs revealed that BusyBee, their AI grading assistant operating on Amazon Bedrock from AWS, has efficiently evaluated assessments across over 600 school domains. The AI-powered assessment system at production scale provides a glimpse into the future of education technology. This news was shared from OREM, Utah on April 13, 2026.
